reasoning: The control MA-4 (3) - Nonlocal Maintenance | Comparable Security and Sanitization is focused on ensuring secure nonlocal maintenance and sanitization practices, which are typically related to physical or operational controls rather than technical configurations within a Kubernetes environment. This control is more about ensuring that remote maintenance activities are conducted securely and that any data remnants are properly sanitized, which does not have a direct equivalent in Kubernetes security domains such as RBAC, NetworkPolicies, or PodSecurity. Kubernetes does not directly manage or enforce nonlocal maintenance procedures or data sanitization policies as these are operational practices rather than technical configurations.
title: Nonlocal Maintenance | Comparable Security and Sanitization
